name: laptop-store
description: Website bán laptop văn phòng & gaming tại Việt Nam

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:db" "npm run dev:be" "npm run dev:fe" --names "db,be,fe" --prefix-colors "blue,yellow,green"
scripts.db:reset: cd docker && docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd shared && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
